mapper.sql: select a.apply_id, a.supplier_id, a.hospital_id, coalesce(nullif(trim(h.hospital_name), ''), a.hospital_name) as hospital_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(s.company_name), ''), a.supplier_name) as supplier_name, h.hospital_code as hospital_code, s.supplier_code as supplier_code, a.supply_start_date, a.supply_end_date, a.contract_no, a.apply_reason, a.contact_person, a.contact_phone, a.audit_status, a.audit_by, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u_audit.real_name), ''), a.audit_by) as audit_by_display, a.audit_time, a.audit_remark, a.del_flag, a.del_by, a.del_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from scm_hospital_supplier_apply a left join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id = cast(nullif(trim(a.supplier_id), '') as unsigned) left join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = cast(nullif(trim(a.hospital_id), '') as unsigned) left join sys_user u_audit on (u_audit.del_flag = '0' or u_audit.del_flag is null or u_audit.del_flag = '') and (u_audit.login_name = a.audit_by or u_audit.user_name = a.audit_by or cast(u_audit.user_id as char) = a.audit_by)
mapper.insert: insert into scm_hospital_supplier_apply ( apply_id, supplier_id, hospital_id, supplier_name, hospital_name, supply_start_date, supply_end_date, contract_no, apply_reason, contact_person, contact_phone, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{applyId}, #{supplierId}, #{hospitalId}, #{supplierName}, #{hospitalName}, #{supplyStartDate}, #{supplyEndDate}, #{contractNo}, #{applyReason}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{delFlag}, #{delBy}, #{delTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: where a.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} and a.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (a.del_flag = '0' or a.del_flag is null) order by a.create_time desc limit 1

and (a.del_flag = '0' or a.del_flag is null) and a.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} and a.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and a.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
and ( ifnull(h.hospital_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(h.hospital_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(h.pinyin_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(a.hospital_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') )
and ( ifnull(s.supplier_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(s.company_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(s.pinyin_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(a.supplier_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
order by a.create_time desc
